narrative:
Precinct Big Spring Township (precinct in Seneca County) has 949 registered voters, with 45.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.6 percentage points.
